codeReview.summary: Lecture 7 extraction successful but Lecture 8 NOT updated. L7 has 15,113 chars (exceeds 14,000+ target). L8 only has 10,659 chars vs required 26,000+ chars. The worker preserved existing 'String Operations' content instead of replacing with 'Memory Hierarchy' content from lecture8_raw.txt.

issues.description: VAL-EXTRACT-002 NOT SATISFIED: Lecture 8 sections have only 10,659 chars, but validation contract requires 26,000+ chars. The worker preserved existing 'String Operations' content because lecture8_raw.txt contains 'Memory Hierarchy' content which topic didn't match.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No documented guidance exists on handling mismatches between raw files and existing lectures.json structure. Workers must decide whether to preserve or replace when topics differ.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: lecture8_raw.txt is Memory Hierarchy content but L8 section is titled String Operations. Worker chose to preserve.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker skill referenced in features.json does not exist in .factory/skills/. Workers proceed without this skill's guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json shows skillName='content-worker', but the skill file was not found
